Playwright POM Framework Skill

This skill documents the Playwright POM test framework in this workspace and provides a helper command to generate a "next prompt" template for future test requests.

Usage
- The repository contains a JavaScript Playwright framework under `pages/`, `tests/`, and `data/`.
- Use the `npm run next-prompt` command to print a ready-made prompt template you can reuse when asking for additional tests or changes.

What the skill helps with
- Generate test ideas and request templates that include: target URL, scenarios, locators, credentials (if needed), expected assertions, and environment instructions.

Location: `.vscode/playwright-skill.md`
